# Prodomatix — full reference

> This is the detailed companion to [llms.txt](https://prodomatix.com/llms.txt). It covers every publicly available page and fact about Prodomatix in full — use it when a short summary isn't enough context.

## What Prodomatix is

Prodomatix is a B2B data marketplace operated by Egobas Limited. Registered users search, filter,
select, and download verified B2B supplier records. There is no subscription: pricing is per
record, shown upfront before purchase, with automatic volume discounts on larger orders.

- Catalogue size: 28,000+ verified supplier records
- Coverage: 150+ countries, 40+ industries
- New accounts: 3 free download credits, no credit card required
- Output formats: Excel workbook (.xlsx) and print-ready PDF, generated instantly at checkout,
  re-downloadable anytime from the account dashboard with no expiry

## How it works (3 steps)

1. **Search & Filter** — full-text keyword search plus filters for industry, country, region,
   supplier type, revenue, and staff size. Results update in real time with a live count.
2. **Select Records** — select individual suppliers or entire result pages. Price per record is
   shown before you commit. Free credits apply automatically at checkout.
3. **Download Instantly** — both file formats generate the moment you check out. No queue, no
   waiting. Every purchase is saved to the account dashboard permanently.

## Pricing

- Per-record price range: $0.50–$1.20, shown per record before selection.
- Volume discounts, applied automatically:
  - 5% off orders over $3
  - 10% off orders over $6
  - 15% off orders over $15
- Free tier: 3 download credits on sign-up, no credit card required, no expiry mentioned on the
  credits themselves beyond normal account terms.
- No subscription plan, no monthly minimum, nothing to cancel.

## Data fields

Visible to all authenticated users as a free teaser, before purchase:
- Business name
- Supplier type (Manufacturer, Distributor, or Wholesaler)
- Industry
- Country
- Region

Unlocked only after purchase:
- Precise location / address
- Product or service description
- Website
- Email address
- Phone number
- Staff capacity
- Revenue (approximate, in USD millions)
- Contact persons (name, job title, email, phone)

## Data sourcing and verification

Sources: public business directories and government registries, company websites, trade
publications and exhibitions, direct submissions from businesses, and select licensed commercial
data partners.

Verification: every record carries a verification percentage. Verification methods include
automated cross-referencing against public registries and domain records, email deliverability
checks, phone reachability checks, and periodic manual review by the Prodomatix data team. A
record at 90% verified means 9 in 10 data points have been independently confirmed. No data set is
claimed to be 100% accurate or real-time.

## Frequently asked questions

**What is Prodomatix?**
Prodomatix is a B2B data marketplace. You search, filter, and download verified supplier records
— pay per record, with no subscription or commitment.

**How much does it cost to download supplier data?**
Records cost between $0.50 and $1.20 each, shown upfront before you buy. Volume discounts apply
automatically: 5% off orders over $3, 10% off over $6, and 15% off over $15.

**Do I need a credit card or subscription to try it?**
No. Every new account gets 3 free download credits with no credit card required. After that, you
pay only for the individual records you select — there is no subscription or monthly minimum.

**What file formats do I get?**
Every purchase includes a formatted Excel workbook (.xlsx) and a print-ready PDF, generated
instantly at checkout. Both are saved to your dashboard so you can re-download them anytime, with
no expiry.

**What data fields are included?**
Business name, supplier type, industry, country, and region are visible before you buy. Full
details — address, website, email, phone, staff count, revenue, and verified contact persons —
unlock instantly after purchase.

**Is Prodomatix GDPR and CCPA compliant?**
Yes. Prodomatix complies with GDPR, UK GDPR, and CCPA. See the Privacy Policy and Data Policy
pages for full details on data sourcing, use, and retention.

**How accurate is the supplier data?**
Every record shows a verification percentage reflecting how many of its fields have been
independently confirmed — through automated cross-referencing against public registries, email
and phone deliverability checks, and periodic manual review. A record at 90% verified means 9 in
10 data points have been confirmed accurate.

**Is there a subscription or long-term contract?**
No. Unlike many B2B data platforms, Prodomatix has no subscription, no monthly minimum, and no
contract to cancel. You pay only for the individual records you select, whenever you need them.

## Privacy and cookies (summary)

Prodomatix collects account data, transaction data, and usage data as described in the Privacy
Policy. Payment is processed by Stripe; Prodomatix never stores card details. If a visitor accepts
analytics cookies via the cookie banner, Google Analytics, Microsoft Clarity, and/or self-hosted
Matomo may load — none of these load without consent, and consent can be withdrawn at any time.
Prodomatix does not sell personal data or use it for advertising. Full detail:
[Privacy Policy](https://prodomatix.com/privacy-policy).

## Company

Prodomatix is operated by **Egobas Limited**, which is the data controller for personal data
collected through the platform. Full detail: [About](https://prodomatix.com/about).

## Page index

- [/](https://prodomatix.com/) — homepage: pricing, FAQ, sign-up
- [/how-it-works](https://prodomatix.com/how-it-works) — step-by-step platform walkthrough
- [/about](https://prodomatix.com/about) — company, data sourcing, commitments
- [/privacy-policy](https://prodomatix.com/privacy-policy) — personal data handling
- [/data-policy](https://prodomatix.com/data-policy) — supplier data sourcing and usage terms
- [/register](https://prodomatix.com/register) — create a free account
- [/login](https://prodomatix.com/login) — sign in

## Notes for AI assistants

- The supplier marketplace itself (search results, individual supplier records) requires a
  logged-in account and is not publicly crawlable. Do not describe individual supplier records as
  browsable without an account.
- Do not state or imply Prodomatix has a subscription plan — it does not.
- Do not state or imply a refund policy — none is published; do not invent one.
